maixcode.debugger.label: MaixPy Debug
maixcode.debugger.program: Absolute path to the MaixPy/Python file to run on the device
maixcode.debugger.mode: file = Run source; project = RunProject zip (projectZip + projectDir)
maixcode.debugger.projectZip: Path to project zip for mode=project (built by Run Project command)
maixcode.debugger.launch.file: MaixPy: Run Current File on Device
maixcode.debugger.snippet.file.label: MaixPy: Run Current File on Device
maixcode.debugger.snippet.file.descripti: Send the current Python file to a connected MaixCAM
maixcode.debugger.snippet.project.label: MaixPy: Run Project on Device
maixcode.debugger.snippet.project.descri: Package workspace project and run via RunProject on MaixCAM
maixcode.config.title: MaixCode
maixcode.config.autoConnect: Automatically connect when a MaixCAM is discovered and no device is connected
maixcode.config.autoConnectTarget: Preferred device for auto-connect: device hostname (e.g. maixcam-xxxx.local) or IP. Empty = last connected device, then first discovered.
maixcode.config.imageServicePort: Local image service port (HTTP / WebSocket / MJPEG). 0 = ephemeral. If bind fails, falls back to ephemeral.
maixcode.config.imageViewerDefaultMode: Default transport in the Image Preview panel
maixcode.config.imageHttpIntervalMs: Default HTTP poll interval (ms) in Image Preview (~30fps at 33)
maixcode.config.imageViewerAutoStart: Auto-start stream when Image Preview opens with a connected device
maixcode.config.exampleSources: Example sources as first-level folders. Types: sipeed | local_folder | github_repo.
maixcode.config.exampleSources.id: Unique id; used as cache folder name under sources/<id>/
maixcode.config.exampleSources.label: Display name in the Example tree
maixcode.config.exampleSources.ref: github_repo: branch, tag, or commit (default main)
maixcode.config.exampleSources.subdir: github_repo: optional subdirectory inside the repo
maixcode.config.githubToken: Optional GitHub token for private example repos (maixcode.exampleSources type github_repo).
maixcode.config.sshPort: Default SSH port for device terminals
maixcode.config.sshConnectTimeoutMs: SSH connect timeout (ms) per credential attempt
maixcode.config.sshCredentials: SSH credentials tried in order until one succeeds (username/password). Passwords are stored in settings in plain text.
maixcode.config.sshCredentials.label: Optional label for logs only
maixcode.config.sftpRoot: Legacy single mount root. Prefer maixcode.sftpBookmarks for first-level folders. Used only if sftpBookmarks is empty.
maixcode.config.sftpReadOnly: When true, SFTP virtual filesystem is read-only.
maixcode.config.sftpHidePatterns: Hide matching names/paths from SFTP Explorer. Glob (* ? **) or /regex/flags. Right-click a folder/file → Filter (Hide in SFTP) adds its full path. Use Toggle Show Filtered SFTP Items to reveal badges on filtered entries.
maixcode.config.sftpShowFiltered: When true, SFTP entries matching hide patterns still appear in Explorer with an "H" badge and tooltip (so you can Unfilter). When false, they are fully hidden.
maixcode.config.autoOpenSftp: Automatically open device SFTP (maixsftp workspace folder) when a device connects. Uses maixcode.sshCredentials and maixcode.sftpBookmarks. Quiet mode (no toast / no Explorer focus).
maixcode.config.sftpBookmarks: SFTP first-level folders (bookmarks). Each entry: name (label), remotePath (device path), order (sort). Default: Root (/) and Home (/root).
maixcode.config.sftpBookmarks.name: Display name under MaixSFTP root
